name: Asana
description: Asana is the easiest way to organize and manage work across teams at scale. See why Asana is a top performer on Capterra. Learn more about Asana

reviews.review_title: Awareness and competence in perfect combo
reviews.review_description: Support has been outstanding and social engagement substantial. It is extremely user friendly and has literally changed my life and the effectiveness of the organisation.
reviews.review_pros: Asana is a company of high social integrity. We tried many project management projects, but only Asana is properly compliant in regards to usability for our vision impaired team members. Where other organisations just ignore you, Asana has gone above and beyond. When there was a small issue with proper labeling of a button, this was treated with priiority and promptly resolved. Furthermore, Asana supports our nonprofit with a generous discount
reviews.review_cons: I love it throughout! I seriously cannot think of anything negative... except maybe that they charge for AI as an add-on, which feels a bit dated.

reviews.review_title: Great for Team Collaboration, Takes Time to Master
reviews.review_description: Overall, my experience with Asana has been very positive. It is a reliable and efficient tool for managing tasks and projects, especially in team environments. Once you get used to the interface, it significantly improves productivity and organization. In terms of ease of use, it starts off slightly complex but becomes intuitive over time. Customer support is helpful, and the platform offers good value for money if you actively use its features.
reviews.review_pros: What I liked most about Asana is its strong task tracking capabilities and flexibility. It makes it easy to organize projects, assign tasks, set deadlines, and track progress in real time. The interface is clean and visually appealing, and features like timelines, boards, and lists allow you to manage work in different ways depending on your preference. Collaboration is also very smooth, especially for teams.
reviews.review_cons: What I liked least about Asana is that it can feel overwhelming at first, especially for new users. There are many features, and it takes some time to fully understand how everything works. Also, some advanced features are only available in paid plans, which may not feel like the best value for smaller teams or individual users.

reviews.review_title: Lots of tools and options!
reviews.review_description: It was a great use for managing basic projects and when things got complex, it was nice but hard to know how to best build out.
reviews.review_pros: Really cool aspect and structure variability, and could manage lots of projects in different formats.
reviews.review_cons: It contained a ton of options and ways to variate and create within projects that were not intuitive.

reviews.review_title: Good, basic project management software for non-profits
reviews.review_pros: Asana helps with organizing and managing larger projects, tasks, and assignments across team members. It is easy to learn, edit, and navigate. It is also helpful that Asana provides a non-profit discount as it supports us in reducing overhead costs and direct money to our programs and individuals we work with.
reviews.review_cons: It would be nice to have some peer-to-peer connections with other people who use Asana to figure out more beneficial ways to use Asana, especially with non-profits. A lot of business-based services and software need to be tailored and adapted for non-profit use, which isn't often talked about in Q&As and support documents.

reviews.review_title: Couldn't live without it.
reviews.review_description: Asana is the perfect tool for my task and project management - I couldn't live without it! I even use it to manage both my business tasks and my personal life and resources too. It's a fantastic platform.
reviews.review_pros: The free plan does more than enough for me and it's got all of the basic, but important, features. It's extremely easy to use, intuitive and makes managing my tasks and projects incredibly easy.
reviews.review_cons: Pricing may be a little much in order to access the few features that would be nice to have, although the free plan does everything I need it to.

reviews.review_title: Asana is great
reviews.review_description: It is a great experience, and I have not stopped using it since I found it and could not find any better software for the same function.
reviews.review_pros: Asana is easy to use and has many fields for a single task that I can add all the information I want, as well as a wide range of integrations and connections to other applications. I like it so much because it organises my work.
reviews.review_cons: I like it overall and hope it is possible to have it integrated with Siri or Google Assistant and Gemini soon, so everything can be organised with audio and as efficiently as possible.

reviews.review_title: Asana - Assignment
reviews.review_description: Variety of features to support your PM task and assignments. Makes it easy for organization to manage and track different task and scrum and sprint in PM.
reviews.review_pros: Value for money easy to assign tasks to different individuals and integration is easy. Reporting and tracking is much more quick and simple.
reviews.review_cons: Customer support is not that great need to email and wait for the agent to be assigned. Resolutions are quick though.

reviews.review_title: Project management gold standard!
reviews.review_pros: Asana is chock full of features and is the gold standard for project management, both for managers and for the people doing the workk. Keeping tasks organized, providing updates on progress, and reporting on team efforts is super easy.
reviews.review_cons: There's a bit of a learning curve for new users, but it's not bad. It's a robust system/platform, so sometimes it can also seem more complicated than it needs to be

reviews.review_title: Asana is the best
reviews.review_description: Working through Asana has been a great experience! I encourage people of any office size to use it or give it a try.
reviews.review_pros: I love how Asana keeps our whole team organized! It’s super easy to make one-time tasks or recurring tasks. It saves communication time on our team. This tool is so valuable for the money!
reviews.review_cons: I wish I could use it for my household, not just at work! Other than that I have no issues with Asana, I can only recommend it.

reviews.review_title: Getting started is straightforward
reviews.review_description: It's straightforward to get things setup and running. My main recommendation is to only use the features you need at the start. You can always adjust over time.
reviews.review_pros: It's easy to communicate with other team members on the status of projects. This helps with identifying blockers in tasks and getting them resolved.
reviews.review_cons: Their basic tier could offer more features, or reduce the pricing of more premium tiers. Certain features are only available in higher tiers that I think should be included in lower plans.

reviews.review_title: Great project and task managing app!
reviews.review_description: Great overall! I love the features and ease of use. The ability to set due dates and notifications has been a game changer for me. I am incredibly challenged with organization and this is the only app that works!
reviews.review_pros: Asana is very easy to use, allows for color coding of projects, allows you to set due days/notifications, assign tasks to team members, and create sub tasks within tasks and projects.
reviews.review_cons: The biggest con of asana is on the mobile app- it is next to impossible to set up your projects and tasks on your dashboard in order of priority so many tasks from different projects show up and not in a specific priority order.

reviews.review_title: They are awesome, except for when they are not
reviews.review_description: Overall its been pretty good, but when you find those weird quirks like i mentioned - they are slow to fix and quick to try and give you a workaround. I hate that. Admit the problem and fix it.
reviews.review_pros: It can do a lot! Great for task management for a medium to large size team. We use it for everything.
reviews.review_cons: There were a few things that seemed pretty inflexible that other similar softwares do - like assigning a task to more than one user. Seems like its a backend issue in the way they developed that they need to fix.

reviews.review_title: What I Know about Asana
reviews.review_description: Collaborative work management and resource allocation and management has been at optimal with the help of Asana.
reviews.review_pros: Asana not only facilitates project and task management but also has other crucial features such as project collaboration and resource management.
reviews.review_cons: It has been over five years since I incorporated Asana and I have never come across overwhelming scenarios.

reviews.review_title: A great project management platform that would benefit all teams.
reviews.review_description: Having used Asana now for well over five years, overall I am really happy with Asana. It allows us to effectively manage projects and track tasks both within our immediate team, and with other stakeholders in our company.
reviews.review_pros: Well priced, this simple to use project management software can be utilised by teams of all sizes across all industries
reviews.review_cons: Search results, particularly for specific keywords within project names, may not always be consistent.

reviews.review_title: Asana A Work Management Powerhouse
reviews.review_description: Asana stands as a titan in the world of work management software for good reason. It brilliantly balances powerful functionality with a clean, intuitive user interface.
reviews.review_pros: Asana's interface is clean, intuitive, and visually appealing. It’s easy for new team members to learn and adopt quickly. Asana is great for managing and tracking projects.
reviews.review_cons: Asana is a bit pricey: To unlock advanced features like Timeline view, custom fields, advanced reporting, and automations, you need a Premium plan, which can become expensive for larger teams.

reviews.review_title: Excellent and powerful work management app! 10/10
reviews.review_description: Unbelievable solution, we are using it for simple and very complex projects. We have managed to successfully integrate Scrum and Agile methods for visualisations and track everything in real time. The only caveat would be the lack of time tracking for individuals, just for the project itself.
reviews.review_pros: The complexity of Asana is unmatched. It provided us with excellent visualisation tool and proper project data tracking, task tracking without any additional costs!
reviews.review_cons: The learning curve might be steep for some, also the lack of individual time tracking - time tracking solely for the project.

reviews.review_title: Gain full control over projects with Asana's project management and collaboration features.
reviews.review_description: Asana has made it easy for us to manage our projects all the way from the time we plan about them to the time we complete them. It provides us with very productive tools that allow us to collaborate and keep everyone focused during our projects. Asana has helped us reduce the project completion time and also allows us to achieve all the project objectives upon the completion of the project.
reviews.review_pros: Asana offers us with great project management features which enable us to plan and streamline our projects operations making it possible to achieve our objectives. Asana has robust project visual boards and tracking features which help us to track the progress of each task during projects. Asana has collaboration features which help us to communicate efficiently and work together during projects. Asana offers incredible project reporting features which help us to gain clear insights about how well or poor we are performing when working on our projects.
reviews.review_cons: It has been a very efficient and smooth experience with Asana and we have not found anything to dislike. Asana's features has been easy to use and we have not come across anything that does not fit our needs. The reliable support services has also made our experience very smooth.

reviews.review_title: Asana makes it easy to manage projects by keeping everything and everyone consolidated.
reviews.review_description: Managing our projects with Asana has really paid off and we have really benefited from streamlined project operations. Asana has an incredible collaboration platform that help us to keep everyone working together during the projects. With Asana, we are able to plan our work during projects to ensure smooth flow of activities.
reviews.review_pros: Asana has a great collaboration platform that help our to bring together people from all departments allowing us to work together on our projects. Asana offers project management functions that help us to organize and strategize our work plans allowing us to streamline our project tasks. Asana has project dashboards, analytics and reporting features which gives us an easy experience following up on the current status and progress of our projects.
reviews.review_cons: After working with Asana, we have not found anything that does not satisfy our needs the best way. We have not discovered any dislikes.

reviews.review_title: The platform that was the organisational backbone of my department!
reviews.review_description: Asana is an excellent tool and the one my whole team worked from, acting as a central project management tool. Asana provides a great return of investment as it is good value for money and the customer support and account management support we received were first rate.
reviews.review_pros: Asana was our go to tool for project tracking and programme management. Asana combined many customisable, ease of use features, such as dragging and dropping various project attributes, that allowed me to manage my department and their projects and tasks tracking progress regularly.
reviews.review_cons: It is not something that I disliked about the Asana, but it is important to cite that Asana is not a replacement for Microsoft Project as a detailed project management tool, but has its own GUI based features which make it ideal for fast pace environments.

reviews.review_title: An Essential Task Management Tool!
reviews.review_description: Asana is used by our marketing and communications team daily. Each project is laid out, scheduled, and assigned to the appropriate team members. This allows everyone involved to stay on task, easily communicate needs and edits, and deliver a high quality product effectively. Asana is an essential task management tool!
reviews.review_pros: Asana is a great platform for working as a team and tracking projects together. I love the ability to set due dates and work toward those goals, to assign tasks to the appropriate team member, and to communicate within the platform.
reviews.review_cons: Asana is a wonderful and effective tool, but if you are not tech savvy, there can be difficulties using it to its full potential.

reviews.review_title: Asana Gives Wealth of Features and Flexibility for Project Management.
reviews.review_description: Asana is a very robust tool for managing projects .Gives the perfect panoramic view of projects for effective management and control.
reviews.review_pros: Asana is a very flexible project manager.The on boarding process is clear and easy . Keep tasks organized and It allow easy tracking of progress and management of multiple projects.Has simple automation that help to save time and reduces human errors .Offer various ways of viewing the projects eg tables ,chart,calendar ,list and many more. Provide a clear transparency where everyone involved in the project is able to see the progress and keep aligned.
reviews.review_cons: Asana is a complete tool only that there is no way one can assign a task to two people which is a challenge when there is a need for two people to handle a certain task.

reviews.review_title: Superior Project Management Tool with Incredible and Easy to Use Features.
reviews.review_description: Overall experience is remarkably the best.Easy to use ,offer best project visualization ,easy to assign an track tasks and reliable for team collaboration.
reviews.review_pros: I appreciate most the way Asana brings together everything our team needs to get work done from setting up project ,assigning and organising tasks to collaborating.Make it simple and smooth to track project progress which help to complete before deadline date. Offer workflow automation that saves a lot of time.The user interface is clean which make on boarding process smooth .
reviews.review_cons: I honestly don't have anything bad to say about Asana.Simply outstanding with so many helpful features.

reviews.review_title: Asana is the GOAT for cross-departmental project management!
reviews.review_description: Asana has helped our team to organize our projects in a cross-departmental manner, breaking them down into individual task tracking so that it's clear who's responsible for what at any given deadline. Asana has also helped our team to visualize project reporting in a more effective way.
reviews.review_pros: Asana helps our teams track project progress cross-departmentally. This the implementation of Asana, we have streamlined our creative project management with visual representations that are easily consumed by any level of management.
reviews.review_cons: The learning curve for Asana is pretty steep to reap the full benefit of its features and can have some limitations in the lower tiers. Asana also relies heavily on integrations to optimize its functionality.

reviews.review_title: Streamlines HR tasks so that you can focus on the people part of the job.
reviews.review_description: Asana is an easy system that streamlined our processes so that we can focus more on the people side of our job. I would recommend Asana to any team that shares responsibilities.
reviews.review_pros: Our HR department consists of two people and while we both have our own individual jobs there are some "tasks" that either of us can do. ASANA has helped us by creating templates for each project that we have and we can both go in and complete the tasks and mark the items off the list. It changed the way that we do HR.
reviews.review_cons: To be honest, the system is easy to use. I have only had to contact customer support once for assistance and they were able to get me the answer that I needed without losing the information that I was afraid I had deleted.

reviews.review_title: Reliable and easy to use for task management
reviews.review_description: I've had a brilliant experience with Asana - great for task management and overseeing content strategy and execution.
reviews.review_pros: Asana is my favourite programme for project management, particularly if its content related such as social media planning or content strategy. It's super easy to use, has all the features you need for tracking tasks and projects with collaborative teams, and has great value for money. It's also really easy to use - normally only requires an hours' training for tech-literate colleagues.
reviews.review_cons: No instant reporting as far as I know. We have to go in to tasks individually and pull the information we need manually and generate reports on how fast tasks have been done etc from that.
